Helper functions, tests, and build script for protobuf log services in Pebble firmware.


## Files
- **[protobuf_log_test_helpers.c](protobuf_log_test_helpers.c.md)**: Helper functions for testing protobuf log parsing using protoc in the Pebble firmware.
- **[protobuf_log_test_helpers.h](protobuf_log_test_helpers.h.md)**: A function to decode a protobuf buffer using a command line tool.
- **[test_protobuf_log.c](test_protobuf_log.c.md)**: Tests for the protobuf logging functionality in the Pebble firmware, including encoding, decoding, and data logging.
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for compiling and testing protobuf log services in the Pebble firmware.
